ChinaEase Buddy

Travel China without the language barrier.

Use ChinaEase Buddy for practical travel help in China: essential apps, payments, taxis, transport, food references, hotel phrases, emergency numbers, and Buddy AI questions. No Chinese needed.

What ChinaEase Buddy does

  • 🍜 Food references and restaurant phrases for common situations
  • 🔊 Speak without speaking — type a phrase and Buddy says it in Chinese for drivers, shopkeepers, and locals
  • 💳 Set up Alipay in minutes — step-by-step guidance for foreign visitors
  • 🚕 Talk to taxis & hotels with no Chinese — bilingual phrase cards for every situation
  • 💬 Phrase cards to show useful Chinese to locals
Guides Travel Passes China travel apps China payment guide China travel checklist Emergency numbers

ChinaEase Buddy is not an official government, visa, immigration, medical, legal, financial, hotel booking, flight booking, or travel agency service. Confirm important information with official sources or service providers.
